domain.description: AgileCRM account subdomain (the <domain> in https://<domain>.agilecrm.com). Templated directly into the base URL; restrict to the safe label charset.

email.description: AgileCRM account email, used as the HTTP Basic auth username.

api_key.description: AgileCRM API key, used as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
